q.en: Why did Henry VIII create the Church of England?
q.zh: 亨利八世为何创立英国国教？

options.en: The pope refused to annul his marriage to Catherine, so Henry broke away and made himself its head
options.zh: 教皇拒绝宣布他与凯瑟琳的婚姻无效，于是亨利脱离天主教会并自任教会领袖

options.en: He wanted to become the single richest and most powerful man in all of Europe, greater than any emperor before him
options.zh: 他想成为全欧洲唯一最富有、最有权势的人，凌驾于此前任何一位皇帝之上

options.en: The people voted to replace the Catholic Church with a new one
options.zh: 人民投票决定以新教会取代天主教会

options.en: He was forced to do so by the king of France
options.zh: 他是被法国国王强迫这样做的

explain.en: When Pope Clement VII refused to annul Henry's marriage to Catherine of Aragon, Henry broke from Rome and made himself the supreme head of the new Church of England.
explain.zh: 当教皇克雷芒七世拒绝宣布亨利与凯瑟琳的婚姻无效时，亨利脱离罗马，自任新成立的英国国教最高领袖。

q.en: What happened to Elizabeth's mother, Anne Boleyn?
q.zh: 伊丽莎白的母亲安妮·博林遭遇了什么？

options.en: She became the undisputed queen of England right after Henry's death and ruled alone for the rest of her long life
options.zh: 亨利一去世，她就无可争议地成为英格兰女王，并在余生长久地独自统治

options.en: Henry accused her of treason and had her executed in 1536, then declared Elizabeth illegitimate
options.zh: 亨利以叛国罪指控她，并于1536年将她处决，随后宣布伊丽莎白为私生女

options.en: She fled to France and became a nun in a convent
options.zh: 她逃往法国，在修道院做了修女

options.en: She ruled England peacefully for twenty years
options.zh: 她和平统治英格兰达二十年

explain.en: Henry accused Anne Boleyn of treason and had her executed in 1536, then declared Elizabeth illegitimate and removed her from the line of succession.
explain.zh: 亨利以叛国罪指控安妮·博林，于1536年将她处决，随后宣布伊丽莎白为私生女并剥夺其继承资格。

q.en: Why was Queen Mary I called 'Bloody Mary'?
q.zh: 玛丽一世女王为何被称为‘血腥玛丽’？

options.en: Because she loved cruel blood sports and spent her days hunting animals for sport across the countryside
options.zh: 因为她嗜好残忍的血腥运动，整天在乡间打猎取乐

options.en: Because she lost a war and much blood was spilled at sea
options.zh: 因为她输掉一场战争，海上血流成河

options.en: Because she ordered the deaths of hundreds of Protestants she viewed as heretics
options.zh: 因为她下令处死数百名她视为异端的清教徒

options.en: Because she was badly wounded in a battle
options.zh: 因为她在战斗中受了重伤

explain.en: Mary I was a devout Catholic who ordered the deaths of hundreds of Protestants she viewed as heretics, earning the nickname Bloody Mary.
explain.zh: 玛丽一世是虔诚的天主教徒，下令处死数百名她视为异端的清教徒，因而得名‘血腥玛丽’。

q.en: What happened to Mary, Queen of Scots?
q.zh: 苏格兰女王玛丽遭遇了什么？

options.en: She married Elizabeth and became co-ruler of England
options.zh: 她嫁给伊丽莎白，成为英格兰的共同统治者

options.en: She was exiled to France where she lived peacefully and died quietly of old age, never returning to Scotland
options.zh: 她被流放到法国，平静地生活并在高龄安详离世，从此再未回到苏格兰

options.en: She defeated Elizabeth and took the English throne by force
options.zh: 她击败伊丽莎白，武力夺取了英格兰王位

options.en: After plots against Elizabeth, she was found guilty of treason and executed in 1587
options.zh: 在针对伊丽莎白的种种阴谋后，她被判叛国罪并于1587年被处决

explain.en: After Catholic plots linked to her, Mary was found guilty of treason; Elizabeth reluctantly signed her death warrant, and Mary was executed on February 8, 1587.
explain.zh: 在与她相关的天主教阴谋暴露后，玛丽被判叛国罪；伊丽莎白不情愿地签署了死刑令，玛丽于1587年2月8日被处决。

q.en: What happened to the Spanish Armada in 1588?
q.zh: 1588年西班牙无敌舰队发生了什么？

options.en: It was defeated by England's faster ships and storms, and only about half the fleet returned home
options.zh: 它被英格兰更快的战舰和风暴击败，约半数舰队得以返回

options.en: It easily conquered England within weeks and proudly captured the city of London without losing a single ship
options.zh: 它在数周内轻松征服英格兰，并得意地攻占了伦敦城，一艘船都没损失

options.en: It was destroyed by France before it ever reached Spain's coast
options.zh: 它在抵达西班牙海岸前就被法国摧毁

options.en: It never actually set sail from the ports of Spain
options.zh: 它实际上从未从西班牙港口启航

explain.en: England's faster ships and rough seas devastated the 130-ship Armada; many crashed on rocky coasts and only about half made it home.
explain.zh: 英格兰更快的战舰与恶劣海况重创了这支130艘战舰的无敌舰队；许多船只撞上礁石，仅有约半数返回。

q.en: What did Sir Francis Drake do that angered King Philip II of Spain?
q.zh: 弗朗西斯·德雷克爵士做了什么激怒了西班牙国王腓力二世？

options.en: He discovered the Americas for England and claimed it all for the crown, renaming it New England
options.zh: 他为英格兰发现了美洲，并将其全部献给王室，还把它改名为新英格兰

options.en: He plundered Spanish ships of gold and silver and destroyed many at Cadiz in 1587
options.zh: 他劫掠了满载金银的西班牙船只，并于1587年在加的斯摧毁了许多西班牙船

options.en: He married Philip's daughter and betrayed Spain
options.zh: 他娶了腓力的女儿并背叛了西班牙

options.en: He personally built the Spanish Armada for the king
options.zh: 他亲自为国王建造了西班牙无敌舰队

explain.en: With Elizabeth's support, Drake raided Spanish treasure ships and in 1587 destroyed many Spanish ships at Cadiz, provoking Philip to plan invasion.
explain.zh: 在伊丽莎白支持下，德雷克劫掠西班牙运宝船，并于1587年在加的斯摧毁多艘西班牙船，促使腓力策划入侵。

options.en: Soldiers who bravely fought aboard the great Spanish Armada against England
options.zh: 在庞大的西班牙无敌舰队上为抗英而英勇作战的士兵

options.en: Kings who gave up their thrones and abdicated
options.zh: 放弃王位并退位的国王

options.en: People who went against the official or accepted religious beliefs
options.zh: 违背官方或公认宗教信仰的人

options.en: Explorers who sailed across the ocean to the New World
options.zh: 横渡大洋前往新大陆的探险家

explain.en: The glossary defines heretics as those who go against official or accepted beliefs or practices, which is why Mary I had such people killed.
explain.zh: 术语表将‘异端’定义为违背官方或公认信仰与习俗的人，这正是玛丽一世处死这类人的原因。

q.en: Why did Elizabeth reject all marriage proposals?
q.zh: 伊丽莎白为何拒绝了所有求婚？

options.en: She had already secretly married a lowly commoner whom she could never reveal, even on her deathbed
options.zh: 她已秘密嫁给一个卑微的平民，且永远不能公开，就连临终时也不曾透露

options.en: She wanted to spend her life traveling the world instead
options.zh: 她想用一生去周游世界

options.en: No one ever actually proposed marriage to her
options.zh: 根本没有人曾向她求婚

options.en: She feared marriage would threaten her power and might put England under a foreign ruler
options.zh: 她担心婚姻会威胁自己的权力，并可能使英格兰受制于外国君主

explain.en: Elizabeth feared that marriage, especially to a foreign king, could cost her power and place England under another country's rule, so she rejected all proposals.
explain.zh: 伊丽莎白担心婚姻（尤其嫁给外国国王）会削弱她的权力，并使英格兰受制于他国，因此拒绝了所有求婚。

q.en: How did Elizabeth's reign affect the arts and learning in England?
q.zh: 伊丽莎白的统治对英格兰的艺术与学术有何影响？

options.en: The arts flourished, literacy rose with better printing, and Shakespeare became a royal patron
options.zh: 艺术繁荣，印刷术改善使识字率上升，莎士比亚成为御用庇护对象

options.en: The arts were strictly banned and thousands of books were burned in public, along with paintings and statues
options.zh: 艺术遭严格禁止，成千上万的书籍连同绘画和雕像一起被公开焚毁

options.en: Only the very wealthy were allowed to read or write at all
options.zh: 只有极富有的人才被允许读书写字

options.en: Music and painting were replaced by daily military drills
options.zh: 音乐与绘画被日常的军事操练所取代

explain.en: Better printing presses and Elizabeth's love of literature raised literacy, the arts flourished, and Shakespeare became a popular royal patron.
explain.zh: 更先进的印刷术与伊丽莎白对文学的喜爱提高了识字率，艺术繁荣，莎士比亚成为广受欢迎的皇家庇护对象。

q.en: What does the book say was Elizabeth's most important legacy?
q.zh: 根据本书，伊丽莎白最重要的legacy是什么？

options.en: She conquered all of Spain and forced it to become a permanent part of England, and she ruled it personally for the rest of her life
options.zh: 她征服了整个西班牙，并迫使它成为英格兰永久的一部分，还亲自统治了余生

options.en: She reduced religious strife, made Protestantism official, and proved a woman could lead well, in a 'Golden Age'
options.zh: 她缓和了宗教冲突，确立新教为国教，并证明了女性同样能胜任领导，开创‘黄金时代’

options.en: She started the Catholic Church in England as its first head
options.zh: 她创立英格兰天主教会并自任首任领袖

options.en: She gave the English throne to the king of France
options.zh: 她把英格兰王位让给了法国国王

explain.en: The book credits Elizabeth with reducing religious strife, establishing Protestantism, showing a woman could lead, and ushering in England's Golden Age.
explain.zh: 书中认为伊丽莎白的功绩在于缓和宗教冲突、确立新教、证明女性亦能领导，并开启了英格兰的黄金时代。

prompt.en: Elizabeth ruled for forty-four years without a husband or an heir of her own body, yet strengthened England into a global empire. What do you think made her such an effective leader, and could a leader today do the same?
prompt.zh: 伊丽莎白在位四十四年，既无丈夫也无亲生继承人，却把英格兰建设成全球性帝国。你认为她为何如此高效？今天的领袖能否做到同样的事？

en: Note her religious tolerance between Catholics and Protestants.
Recall how she defeated the Spanish Armada and backed exploration and trade.
Think about her support for the arts, including Shakespeare.
Consider why refusing marriage helped her keep power.
zh: 注意她在天主教徒与新教徒之间的宗教宽容。
回想她如何击败西班牙无敌舰队、支持探索与贸易。
思考她对艺术的扶持，包括莎士比亚。
想想她拒绝婚姻如何帮助她保住权力。
